'''Luke Polselli''' (born 6 August 1998) is an [[Italy national rugby league team|Italy international]] [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} or {{rlp|fb}} for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Polselli is of [[Italy|Italian]] descent.<ref>[https://www.zerotackle.com/players/luke-polselli/ Zero Tackle profile]</ref>

==Playing career==
===Club career===
Polselli previously played for the [[Mackay Cutters]] & the [[Sunshine Coast Falcons]] in the [[Queensland Cup]].{{fact|date=January 2024}}

===Rochdale Mayfield===
On 4 January 2025 it was reported that he had joined English club [[Rochdale Mayfield]] to play in the [[National Conference League]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=4 Jan 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=National Conference League club snap up duo from Down Under for 2025, including Italy international|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/national-conference-league-club-snap-up-duo-from-down-under-for-2025-including-italy-international}}</ref>

===London Broncos===
On 20 January 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=20 Jan 2025|author=Callum Walker|title=Italian international Luke Polselli makes UK move|url=https://www.totalrl.com/italian-international-luke-polselli-makes-uk-move/}}</ref>

===Toulouse Olympique===
On 26 October 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=26 Oct 2025|author=Aaron Bower|title=Toulouse land first 2026 signing as London Broncos star signs for Super League newcomers|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/toulouse-land-first-2026-signing-as-london-broncos-star-signs-for-super-league-newcomers}}</ref>

===International career===
In 2022, Polselli was named in the [[2021_Men's_Rugby_League_World_Cup_squads#Italy|Italy squad]] for the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/rugby-league-world-cup-2021-squad-lists/ Full list of every squad at the Rugby League World Cup 2021]</ref>
